import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import StatCard from '../components/StatCard'; import ActivityFeed from '../components/ActivityFeed'; const Home = () => { const [bikes, setBikes] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetchBikes(); }, []); const fetchBikes = async () => { try { const response = await fetch('http://localhost:5002/api/bikes'); const result = await response.json(); if (result.success) { setBikes(result.data); } } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching bikes:', error); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; const availableBikes = bikes.filter(b => b.available !== false).length; const totalFleet = bikes.length; // Monthly revenue data for chart const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec']; const revenueData = [45, 62, 55, 78, 85, 92, 88, 95, 72, 68, 80, 98]; const maxRevenue = Math.max(...revenueData); // Recent bookings mock const recentBookings = [ { id: 'BK-1045', customer: 'Rahul Kumar', bike: 'Royal Enfield Classic 350', amount: '₹4,500', status: 'confirmed', date: '2026-02-24' }, { id: 'BK-1044', customer: 'Priya Sharma', bike: 'NS 200', amount: '₹3,600', status: 'active', date: '2026-02-23' }, { id: 'BK-1043', customer: 'Amit Patel', bike: 'GT 650', amount: '₹7,500', status: 'pending', date: '2026-02-23' }, { id: 'BK-1042', customer: 'Sneha Reddy', bike: 'DUKE 200', amount: '₹3,800', status: 'active', date: '2026-02-22' }, { id: 'BK-1041', customer: 'Vikram Singh', bike: 'MT 15', amount: '₹3,200', status: 'completed', date: '2026-02-22' }, ]; const getStatusBadge = (status) => { const map = { pending: 'warning', confirmed: 'info', active: 'success', completed: 'neutral', cancelled: 'danger' }; return map[status] || 'neutral'; }; return (

); }; export default Home;
